_comment: Shared roommate/household config — the single source of truth for WHO is commuting, with TWO scrape profiles. 'liam' = solo: always the HackerRank office; that scraper looks for rooms/studios/1bd everywhere on the corridor. 'group' = the 5-person SF-only shared-household profile; targetBedrooms overrides people count for scrape bedrooms and the total budget is 5 x $2,650 = $13,250/mo. Addressless placeholder roommates are intentional: export_housing_data.py normalizes them to empty addresses so they do not create fake commute scoring destinations. The dashboard seeds its Liam/Group profiles from here (export_housing_data.py -> defaultLiam + defaultPeople) and its '⧉ Copy as scrape config' button writes the active profile back here. Per-person: arrival (HH:MM, next Mon/Wed/Thu), car/bike (route-optimization options).

people.name: Liam
people.address: 2350 Mission College Blvd #750, Santa Clara, CA 95054
